title: cynodon dactylon subsp. glabratus
intro: Cynodon dactylon subsp. glabratus, also known as the smooth buffelgrass, is a subspecies of the Cynodon dactylon grass species. This plant is commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Cynodon dactylon subsp. glabratus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antidiabetic properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing its leaves and roots in water or oil, and it can also be consumed as a decoction or tea to harness its medicinal properties.
